roa.docketEntryComment: Bench Warrant Recalled
DUI PROGRAM ENROLLMENT & COMPLETION STATUS REPORT RECEIVED
3 MONTHS FOP -PROOF OF ENROLLMENT FILED
/CAL:TO SET HEARING OR FILE CR-110/DAWT/CTORD:CR-110 & 11 ARE FILED IN RE: VICTIM SAMUEL NARENS - $929,34/CTORD:AS TO VICTIM ERIN LEONCIO, A GENERAL ORDER OF VICTIM RESTITUTION IS MADE/

/CAL:APD MIS REST REPORT/DAWT/X:COUNSEL NOT PRESENT, THE PEOPLE WILL CONTACT MR, SHATZKO AND NOTIFYHIM OF RESTITUTION AND DATE/X:APD DETERMINED RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $929,34/CONTD:SET HEARING OR CR110 FILING/DOPU:COUNSEL WITH AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT JUDGMENT/

/CAL:PEOPLE TO DETERMINE RESTITUTION/DAWT/DEF:IS ORDERED TO REPORT TO THEADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNIT FOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION/RESTRPT:02-22-18/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/

/CAL:PTD PROG RE RESTITUTION/CTORD:PTD IS RELIEVED AS THEY HAVE DETERMINEDRESTITUTION AMOUNTS/CONTD:PEOPLE TO DETERMINE REST, SET HEARING & POSS CR-110, CR-111 FILING/DOPU:COUNSEL WITH AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT RESTITUTION/

/CAL:PTD PROG REPORT RE RESTITUTION/NP/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL IS UNABLE TO APPEAR, BUT INFORMS THE COURT VIA PHONE THAT HE BELIEVES THAT THE RESTITUTIONHAS BEEN SATISFIED,/X:PTD IS RELIEVED,/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT RE RESTITUTION/DAWF/
/CAL:DEFT MOTION TO RECALL BW/NP/BWR:04-24-17  /BWR1/REIN ORIG TC/PROB EXT:01-25-20/DEF:RE-REFERRED TO PTD AND TO CONTACT PTD BY C,O,B, OF 5-12-17/CONTD:PTD PROG RE REST/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:PTD PROG REPORT RE RESTITUTION/DAWT/X:ATTORNEY OF RECORD DID NOT APPEAR IN COURT - THE CLERK NOTIFIED HIM VIA E-MAIL AND INFORMED HIM OF THE FUTURE DATE AND FOR HIS CLIENT TO REPORT TO PTD/CONT/

/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1 D/CTS:1/PF390 12/VF2:150/FOP1:3 MONTH/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEAFORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTHHEREIN/RESTPTD/PTDSTIP/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/CONTD:REPORT FROM PTD RE RESTITUTION/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/X:COLLIN JONES, CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, APPEARED UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF ADA OF RECORD,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/CONTD:PRETRIAL/DAWF/
/CAL:PTD PROG RE RESTITUTION/DAWT/CONT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT RE RESTITUTION/DAWT/X:DEFENSE ATTORNEY IS NOT PRESENT/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CONT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:PTD PROG RE RESTITUTION/DAWT/CONT/DOPU:PTD/
/CAL:DEFT REQUEST TO RECALL BW/NP/CONT/
/CAL:PTD PROG RE RESTITUTION/FTA/PROB ADM REV/BWI/BAIL:3000/
/CAL:PLEA/TN:SARAH MORIMOTO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENTPLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 27/TRANS 27:FORTHWITH FOR DISPOSITION/
/CAL:TOS ET OR DISPO/DAWT/CONT/DOPC/
/DAWT/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/DOPC/
